# Ehsanul Haque Siam

> AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. I bridge research and production. Research Assistant at Deepchain Labs driving R&D in blockchain, cybersecurity, and quantum cryptography. Published peer-reviewed research (a Taylor & Francis book chapter and an accepted IEEE QPAIN 2026 paper) while shipping 4 production websites that drove 1.5x client revenue at BetaScript LLC. Built 15+ web scrapers and Gemini-powered AI classification pipelines at BDTracks. Obsessed with turning complex problems into systems that scale.
> Last updated: 2026-07-02. Contact: ehsanul.siamdev@gmail.com

## Now
- **Research Assistant (Full-time, Remote), Deepchain Labs** (Apr 2026 - Present)
- **Solo Developer (Part-time, ~20 hrs/week), BetaScript LLC** (Jan 2026 - Present)
- **AI & Data Engineer (Part-time, ~15 hrs/week), BDTracks** (Aug 2025 - Present)

## Highlights
- 1.5x — Revenue Growth
- 50K+ — Users Served
- 3 — Papers & Talks
- 8+ — Production Apps

- Unfolding Emerging Issues in the Context of Changing Climatic Scenario — 2nd South Asian Conference on Climate (Sep 2024 | Statistical Analysis & Presentation)
